# coolify_github_apps (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify GitHub App integrations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_github_apps" "all" {}

output "github_app_names" {
  value = [for a in data.coolify_github_apps.all.github_apps : a.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `github_apps` (Attributes List) The list of GitHub Apps. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--github_apps))

<a id="nestedatt--github_apps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `github_apps`

Read-Only:

- `app_id` (Number) The GitHub App ID.
- `client_id` (String) The GitHub App client ID.
- `id` (Number) The numeric identifier of the GitHub App.
- `installation_id` (Number) The GitHub App installation ID.
- `name` (String) The name of the GitHub App.
- `organization_name` (String) The GitHub organization name.
- `webhook_secret` (String, Sensitive) The GitHub App webhook secret.
